# pihole_dhcp_static_lease (Data Source)

Fetches a single DHCP static lease by MAC address.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mac` (String) The MAC address to look up.

### Read-Only

- `hostname` (String) The hostname assigned to the device.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `ip` (String) The IP address assigned to the device.
